name: gb200_nvl576_hierarchical_inc
_comment: NVL576 with NVLS + Quantum SHARP. Intra-rack tier = NVLS (0.2 us cut-through), inter-rack tier = IB SHARP (0.4 us cut-through). Collectives spanning >72 ranks hit the multi-tier INC aggregation tree: n_alpha = 2 (0.2 + 0.4) = 1.2 us versus the software path's 2*575 = 1150 us (ring). Set tuner.inc_enabled=False to A/B against software fallback. A2A stays software — neither NVSwitch Gen4 nor SHARP accelerates it structurally.
